completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for SCN-002-023 search empty-results drift. No source, test, parent artifact, or certification-owned fields modified.
Added raw vector-search confidence gating and text fallback, plus SCN-002-023 unit regressions for low-confidence, raw-before-boost, and explicit-filter behavior.
Unit and check commands passed; post-fix shared shell search E2E scripts passed, but ./smackerel.sh test e2e exited 1 due unrelated shell and Go E2E failures and is not certified green.

pendingTransitionRequests.reason: Search-owned implementation evidence is ready for validation review, but certification must remain blocked until broad-suite non-search failures are classified or resolved.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered broad E2E blocker for the spec 002 search empty-results scenario.
Implemented vector confidence gating and verified unit/check/search E2E evidence. Scope remains in progress because broad E2E has unrelated failures and validation-owned certification is not set.

failures.summary: test_search.sh SCN-002-023 unknown query expected 0 results, actual 5.

Post-fix shell search E2E scripts passed, but broad E2E exited 1. Remaining unrelated failures: test_persistence.sh, test_postgres_readiness_gate.sh, test_digest_telegram.sh, test_topic_lifecycle.sh, TestE2E_DomainExtraction, and TestOperatorStatus_RecommendationProvidersEmptyByDefault.

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: Single bug scope; owner starts with targeted red-stage proof before edits.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: bubbles.validate certification after targeted and broader E2E evidence.
